# terrible_cisco_dnac_configuration_template (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `author` (String) Author of template.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `composite` (Boolean) Is it composite template.
- `containingTemplates` (String) Configuration Template's containingTemplates.
- `createTime` (Number) Create time of template.
- `customParamsOrder` (Boolean) Custom Params Order.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `description` (String) Description of template.
- `deviceTypes` (String) Configuration Template's deviceTypes.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `failurePolicy` (String) Define failure policy if template provisioning fails.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `language` (String) Template language (JINJA or VELOCITY).
- `lastUpdateTime` (Number) Update time of template.
- `latestVersionTime` (Number) Latest versioned template time.
- `name` (String) Name of template.
- `parentTemplateId` (String) Parent templateID.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `projectId` (String) Project UUID.
- `projectName` (String) Project name.
- `rollbackTemplateContent` (String) Rollback template content.
- `rollbackTemplateParams` (String) Configuration Template's rollbackTemplateParams.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `softwareType` (String) Applicable device software type.
- `softwareVariant` (String) Applicable device software variant.
- `softwareVersion` (String) Applicable device software version.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `templateContent` (String) Template content.
- `templateId` (String) TemplateId path parameter. TemplateId(UUID) of template to be deleted.
- `templateParams` (String) Configuration Template's templateParams.
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `validationErrors` (String) Configuration Template's validationErrors.
- `version` (String) Current version of template.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `dnac_response` (String) A dictionary or list with the response returned by the Cisco DNAC Python SDK
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
